What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

Feeding your baby shouldn't be a challenge. But if it is I'm here to help, If your insurance is out of network, a Superbill will be provided for you to submit to your insurance for full or partial reimbursement, Home visits (even for in network patients) will incur a travel and set up fee that is not covered by insurance, pre/post-feeding weight checks to verify milk transfer

Today ops snapshot Consult + visit board Parent record Intake + insurance view Feeding cadence + weight check view Follow-up + package enrollment view Setup map

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • Every parent gets one record with intake details, in-home vs in-office decision, and insurance-verification path already resolved.
  • Superbill status and Lactation Network / Wildflower / Aetna Google Form routing are tracked per client so reimbursement follow-ups stop living in email.
  • Weight-check and follow-up cadence from the Initial Postpartum Visit and 3-Visit Package sits on one timeline instead of rebooked one message at a time.
